'''Malicar 3''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], covered in rocky wastes.

==History==
In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="BFOmnibus">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Boba Fett]]''</ref> [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mir Tork]] and Dr. [[Leonis Murthé]] fled to Malicar 3 from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] onboard the [[Imperial extermination ship]] ''[[Azgoghk]]''.<ref name="aod"/>

[[File:Malicar_3.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] engages the ''[[Azgoghk]]'' on Malicar 3.]]

[[Slique Brighteyes]], one of the last member of a species targeted by the ship, the [[Gulmarid]]s, hired [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to execute Murthé and Tork. Fett engaged with the ''Azgoghk'' on Malicar 3, disabling it and killing its two insane overseers. The ship remained dormant on Malicar 3 and the planet then served as home for the nonhumans freed from the Empire.<ref name="aod"/>

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' {{1st}}
